summary.text: Configures the Java application to run using a Gradle task (e.g.,

java

members.name: WithJvmArgs

summary.text: Configures the Java Virtual Machine arguments for the Java application. The arguments are set via the
JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS
environment variable, which is recognized by the JVM regardless of how the application is launched (e.g.,
java -jar
, Maven wrapper, or Gradle wrapper).
